mnemonics: C.A.S.T. (for the Agile Tool Set): Communication, Automation, Storyboards, Tracking
keyPoints: Agile tools facilitate collaboration and communication among team members.
Automation tools (like CI/CD) are crucial for rapid iterations and maintaining code quality.
Project tracking tools (like Jira or Trello) provide visibility into progress and help manage backlogs.
commonMistakes: Focusing too much on the tool rather than the underlying Agile principles and human interactions.
Using tools that are overly complex or rigid, which can hinder the flexibility of the Agile process.
